source: user-data/GG4E/disc/root/poq_adx_usa.afs (parsed from AFS table + ADX headers)
note: Scratch index only (AUDIO-PORT-STATUS 'Next Proof Steps' #1). Durations come from each ADX header's sample count / sample rate. 'range' labels follow the exporter's index convention (0..32 bgm, 33..37 se, 38..2112 voice-range, 2113..2114 non-ADX media) and are NOT semantic proof: nothing here confirms which member plays for which in-game event, and the 'voice-range' block has not been proven to be voices-only. exportedKey marks members already exported to apps/game/public/audio.
